step_by_step_thinking:

The key point here is the specific use of LDH in reflecting the overall metabolic activity related to seminoma, especially concerning metastatic involvement and therapeutic outcome assessment. Disagreement would require strong evidence suggesting another marker performs better in all contexts relative to seminoma diagnostics and follow-up. Since none was presented, my stance holds firm. Answer Choice: B.
